summary: Frontend-only verification of scroll-driven storytelling fixes (cosmic warp continuity, Telegram CTA mobile layout, white-overlay removal, MusicPlayer volume clamp). All 8 tests in the review request PASS on both Desktop (1920x1080) and Mobile (390x844 via CDP setDeviceMetricsOverride). No regressions detected.

tests_executed.TEST_1_cosmic_warp_visible_in_hero: PASS - hero screenshot shows planet, orbital rings, particle streaks on both desktop & mobile. WELCOME! kicker visible.
tests_executed.TEST_2_overlap_continuity: PASS - mobile_overlap.png and mobile_kicker_check.png show cosmic warp streaks bleeding through behind the 'CHOOSE YOUR PATH TO MASTERY.' headline. Programmatic overlap detection (pr_top < cj_bottom while both in viewport) returned True on mobile. On desktop the cosmic-journey is 280svh tall so DOM overlap exists with -mt-[60vh] paths offset; visual screenshot confirms streaks behind the headline.
tests_executed.TEST_3_kicker_above_headline: PASS - exactly ONE '— you have arrived' kicker present (P tag, class heading-display text-amber-300, computed color rgb(252,211,77)) sitting directly above the H2 'Choose your path to mastery.' headline. The OLD kicker inside CosmicJourney (data-testid='cosmic-journey') is fully removed (count=0).
tests_executed.TEST_4_telegram_cta_mobile_layout: PASS - on 390-wide viewport: kicker '— join the channel' (top=4189), headline 'Stay up to speed…' (top=4189-ish), and 'Join Group Chat' button (top=4390, w=134, h=23) are all visible with non-zero rects. Aspect 4/5 mobile applied. No collision with orbital animation. mobile_telegram.png confirms.
tests_executed.TEST_5_no_white_overlay: PASS - white-overlay corner-pixel scan (5 sample points × ~22 scroll stops × 2 viewports = ~220 samples) yielded 0 white hits (>230,>230,>230,alpha>0.5). Footer fades smoothly via linear-gradient(rgba(5,6,10,0)→rgb(10,12,20)) — confirmed in desktop_footer.png and mobile_footer.png.
tests_executed.TEST_6_scroll_smoothness: PASS - programmatic scroll 0→bottom in steps (300px desktop, 200px mobile) and bottom→0 reversed; all getBoundingClientRect samples for cosmic-journey & paths-reveal returned numeric/stable values, no NaN, no element disappearing/reappearing inappropriately.
tests_executed.TEST_7_console_errors: PASS - 0 console errors over full scroll cycle on both viewports. ZERO 'volume' / 'out of range' messages. The clamp `Math.max(0, Math.min(1, v))` in MusicPlayer.tsx fadeVolumeTo is effective.
tests_executed.TEST_8_data_testid_presence: PASS - cosmic-journey, paths-reveal, chapter-cosmos, hero-scroll-indicator all present and rendered on both viewports.

critical_code_review_comments: P2 (already known): THREE.Clock deprecation warning is acceptable backlog item per request.

Minor maintainability: the kicker copy uses an em-dash prefix '— you have arrived' rather than 'YOU HAVE ARRIVED'. If a future test or copy-validator searches for the literal 'YOU HAVE ARRIVED' it will miss; consider exposing a stable data-testid='paths-kicker' for tests instead of relying on textContent matching.
Telegram CTA box: button height=23.7px on 390-wide viewport feels small for a touch target (Apple HIG: 44pt min). Consider bumping vertical padding on mobile.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project is Next.js 14 App Router at /app/ (NOT FastAPI/React). Dev server runs via supervisor `yarn dev` on port 3000; preview URL https://scroll-fix-deploy-1.preview.emergentagent.com/. Mobile emulation REQUIRES CDP Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride with mobile:true — set_viewport_size alone does not trigger mobile media queries / aspect-[4/5] vs aspect-[16/6] switches. Kicker text on home page actually reads '— you have arrived' (em-dash + lowercase) NOT 'YOU HAVE ARRIVED' — match case-insensitively. CosmicJourney is sticky 240svh mobile / 280svh desktop with paths-reveal pulled up via -mt-[55vh] sm:-mt-[60vh] for overlap. MusicPlayer volume clamp is at /app/components/MusicPlayer.tsx fadeVolumeTo line ~91.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — no defects found this iteration. The previously reported issues (white overlay, Telegram cramped layout, missing cosmic background, MusicPlayer volume out-of-range error) are all confirmed FIXED.
